eventScripts.script:
if not initialChange:
        if currentValue.value == 1:
            # perform UpdateMixVolume here
            row = "4"
            element = str(int(row) - 1)
            
            # List of tags to read
            tags_to_read = [
                "[.]Actual",
                "[.]Chem Number",
                "[.]../../Edge/Timers/Chem 0",
                "[.]../../Mix ID",
                "[.]As Mixed",
                "[.]../../Starting Tank Volume",
                "[.]Chemical Name",
                "[.]../../UI/UI[0,0]",
                "[.]../../UI/UI[0,1]"
            ]
            
            # Perform the tag reads in one call
            tag_values = system.tag.readBlocking(tags_to_read)
            
            # Assign the values to variables
            flowEnd = tag_values[0].value
            PLCChemNumber = tag_values[1].value
            timeActual = tag_values[2].value
            mixID = tag_values[3].value
            solperasMixed = tag_values[4].value
            tanklevelStart = tag_values[5].value
            tank = tag_values[6].value
            tagPath = tag_values[7].value
            dbName = tag_values[8].value
            
            # Call the mixUpdates function
            mix.mixUpdates.mixUpdates(row, element, flowEnd, timeActual, mixID, tanklevelStart, solperasMixed, tank, tagPath, dbName)

tags.expression:
numberFormat(
  if(
    toInt({[.]../../Mix Details[3,0]}) = 18,  // ✅ Only process if ChemNumber = 23 (Dye)
    
    if(
      abs(toFloat({[.]Required Tank Target Active Lbs}) - toFloat({[.]Required Tank Start Active Lbs})) < 0.0001, 
      0,  // ✅ Skip if Start & Target Active Lbs are the same
      (
        (
          toFloat({[.]Required Tank Target Active Lbs}) 
          - toFloat({[.]Required Tank Start Active Lbs})  
        )
        /
        max(toFloat({[.]../../Mix Details[3,23]}) / 100, 0.0001)  // ✅ Active Solution % (Avoid Zero)
        /
        max(toFloat({[.]../../Mix Details[3,22]}), 0.0001)  // ✅ Density moved out (Corrected Order)
        *
        128  // ✅ Convert gallons to ounces
      )
    ),
    0  // ✅ Skip calculation for non-Dye chemicals
  )
,"###0.000")  // ✅ Display in ounces with high precision

tags.expression:
numberFormat(
if({[.]../../Mix Details[7,24]} != 0,										//If chemical/row is in use
	if({[.]../../Mix Details[7,0]} != 12,					//If not wax
		if ({[.]../../Mix Details[6,9]} = 0,					//If active lbs were already derived using gallons do this
			(if ({[.]../../Edge/Control/Transfer Active} = True,																									// 24JAN2024 AA Added to do transfer functionality
			(toFloat({[.]Required Tank Target Active Lbs})-toFloat({[.]Required Tank Start Active Lbs})-toFloat({[.]../../Transfer Composition[7,2]})),			// 24JAN2024 AA Added to do transfer functionality
			(toFloat({[.]Required Tank Target Active Lbs})-toFloat({[.]Required Tank Start Active Lbs}))))					//Total quantity of Active lbs required										// 24JAN2024 AA Updated Used to be out of the if statement
			/
			toFloat({[.]../../Mix Details[7,23]}/100)		//Active solution percent of chemical from DB as percent
			/
			toFloat({[.]../../Mix Details[7,22]})			//Density of Chemical from DB
			,																								//If active lbs are derived with ounces, must convert
			(if ({[.]../../Edge/Control/Transfer Active} = True,																									// 24JAN2024 AA Added to do transfer functionality
				(toFloat({[.]Required Tank Target Active Lbs})-toFloat({[.]Required Tank Start Active Lbs})-toFloat({[.]../../Mix Details[7,2]})),		// 24JAN2024 AA Added to do transfer functionality
				(toFloat({[.]Required Tank Target Active Lbs})-toFloat({[.]Required Tank Start Active Lbs})))					//Total quantity of Active lbs required										// 24JAN2024 AA Updated Used to be out of the if statement
			/
			toFloat({[.]../../Mix Details[7,23]}/100)		//Active solution percent of chemical from DB as percent
			/
			toFloat({[.]../../Mix Details[7,22]}))			//Density of Chemical from DB
			*
			128),
		({[.]../Selected Tally Cubic FT}*{[.]../../Mix Details[7,15]})
			/{[.]../../Mix Details[7,22]})					//If is wax, use this equation instead
,0)
,"###0.0")

eventScripts.script:
if not initialChange:
        if currentValue.value == 1:
            # perform UpdateMixVolume here
            row = "5"
            element = str(int(row) - 1)
            
            # List of tags to read
            tags_to_read = [
                "[.]Actual",
                "[.]Chem Number",
                "[.]../../Edge/Timers/Chem 0",
                "[.]../../Mix ID",
                "[.]As Mixed",
                "[.]../../Starting Tank Volume",
                "[.]Chemical Name",
                "[.]../../UI/UI[0,0]",
                "[.]../../UI/UI[0,1]"
            ]
            
            # Perform the tag reads in one call
            tag_values = system.tag.readBlocking(tags_to_read)
            
            # Assign the values to variables
            flowEnd = tag_values[0].value
            PLCChemNumber = tag_values[1].value
            timeActual = tag_values[2].value
            mixID = tag_values[3].value
            solperasMixed = tag_values[4].value
            tanklevelStart = tag_values[5].value
            tank = tag_values[6].value
            tagPath = tag_values[7].value
            dbName = tag_values[8].value
            
            # Call the mixUpdates function
            mix.mixUpdates.mixUpdates(row, element, flowEnd, timeActual, mixID, tanklevelStart, solperasMixed, tank, tagPath, dbName)

if({[.]../../Mix Details[5,24]} != 0,										//If chemical/row is in use
	if({[.]../../Mix Details[5,0]} != 12,					//If not wax
		if ({[.]../../Mix Details[5,9]} = 0,					//If active lbs were already derived using gallons do this
			(if ({[.]../../Edge/Control/Transfer Active} = True,																									// 24JAN2024 AA Added to do transfer functionality
			(toFloat({[.]Required Tank Target Active Lbs})-toFloat({[.]Required Tank Start Active Lbs})-toFloat({[.]../../Transfer Composition[5,2]})),			// 24JAN2024 AA Added to do transfer functionality
			(toFloat({[.]Required Tank Target Active Lbs})-toFloat({[.]Required Tank Start Active Lbs}))))					//Total quantity of Active lbs required										// 24JAN2024 AA Updated Used to be out of the if statement
			/
			toFloat({[.]../../Mix Details[5,23]}/100)		//Active solution percent of chemical from DB as percent
			/
			toFloat({[.]../../Mix Details[5,22]})			//Density of Chemical from DB
			,																								//If active lbs are derived with ounces, must convert
			(if ({[.]../../Edge/Control/Transfer Active} = True,																									// 24JAN2024 AA Added to do transfer functionality
				(toFloat({[.]Required Tank Target Active Lbs})-toFloat({[.]Required Tank Start Active Lbs})-toFloat({[.]../../Mix Details[5,2]})),		// 24JAN2024 AA Added to do transfer functionality
				(toFloat({[.]Required Tank Target Active Lbs})-toFloat({[.]Required Tank Start Active Lbs})))					//Total quantity of Active lbs required										// 24JAN2024 AA Updated Used to be out of the if statement
			/
			toFloat({[.]../../Mix Details[5,23]}/100)		//Active solution percent of chemical from DB as percent
			/
			toFloat({[.]../../Mix Details[5,22]}))			//Density of Chemical from DB
			*
			128),
		({[.]../Selected Tally Cubic FT}*{[.]../../Mix Details[5,15]})
			/{[.]../../Mix Details[5,22]})					//If is wax, use this equation instead
,0)
,"###0.0")

eventScripts.script:
if not initialChange:
        if currentValue.value == 1:
            # perform UpdateMixVolume here
            row = "1"
            element = str(int(row) - 1)
            
            # List of tags to read
            tags_to_read = [
                "[.]Actual",
                "[.]Chem Number",
                "[.]../../Edge/Timers/Chem 0",
                "[.]../../Mix ID",
                "[.]As Mixed",
                "[.]../../Starting Tank Volume",
                "[.]Chemical Name",
                "[.]../../UI/UI[0,0]",
                "[.]../../UI/UI[0,1]"
            ]
            
            # Perform the tag reads in one call
            tag_values = system.tag.readBlocking(tags_to_read)
            
            # Assign the values to variables
            flowEnd = tag_values[0].value
            PLCChemNumber = tag_values[1].value
            timeActual = tag_values[2].value
            mixID = tag_values[3].value
            solperasMixed = tag_values[4].value
            tanklevelStart = tag_values[5].value
            tank = tag_values[6].value
            tagPath = tag_values[7].value
            dbName = tag_values[8].value
            
            # Call the mixUpdates function
            mix.mixUpdates.mixUpdates(row, element, flowEnd, timeActual, mixID, tanklevelStart, solperasMixed, tank, tagPath, dbName)

if({[SCADA]SystemControlTags/LabelDisplayDatasets/MixLists/MixDetails[0,1]} != ''												//if Chem exists

	if ((toFloat({[.]Actual}) + toFloat({[.]../../../LabelDisplayDatasets/MixLists/MixDetails[0,19]}))> toFloat({[.]Required}),1,0)
,0)
